title: vitex turczaninowii
intro: Vitex turczaninowii, also known as Chinese chastetree or Chinese chaste tree, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its flavonoids and lignans. The health benefits of Vitex turczaninowii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and regulating menstrual cycles. Vitex turczaninowii is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or capsule, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and balance.
